name: Quick Spaghetti Sauce W/Homemade Spaghetti Seasoning Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a medium skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Drain excess grease.
3. Add tomato sauce, tomato paste, and tomato juice or water.
4. Stir in the spaghetti seasoning mix.
5. Add any extras you wish to use (sliced black olives and/or mushrooms).
6. Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Makes 4-6 servings.
